items.title: Increase usability of file views (Ctrl+Scroll=zoom etc.)
items.excerpt:
I would love to have a more user-friendly and seamless scrolling option for pdfs and/or other types of files. 
Like every normal pdf-viewer (via Ctrl+Scroll) works.

items.title: Download Multiple Files in the Updates Files Area, But Only Selected Files
items.excerpt:
I am looking for a way to be able to select multiple files in the Updates section of an item. there is an option to download all as a zip, or one at a time. 
Example: we had a user upload 50 files last week, then another…

items.title: Emails and Activities viewable from mobile
items.excerpt: Emails and activities would be such a great asset to our workflow if we could access it from our mobile devices!

items.excerpt: Hello! It would be phenomenal to integrate Lessonly with monday.com for data, reporting, and workstreams. Thanks!

items.title: Choosing a specific group when importing excel
items.excerpt: Today, when an excel file is importing, the imported data is automatically added to a new group. Could we get a feature that will allow a selection of the group to import the date into?

items.title: Add Bulk Items' name edit
items.excerpt: Hey! It would be great to have the option to select multiple items(subitems) and edit its names as when we duplicate more items they cannot be edited, so, you have to edit one by one and delete (copy) on each one.
